examples.text: Dogs also help people relax, and they can be a particular comfort to those with chronic diseases.
examples.explanation: 狗也能帮助人们放松，它们对患有慢性疾病的人尤其是一种慰藉。

reviewSessions.example_text: Dogs also help people relax, and they can be a particular comfort to those with chronic diseases.
reviewSessions.feedback: 意思基本正确，但更地道的对应是“慢性疾病”，不建议译为“长期疾病”。
matched_points: 理解为持续时间较长的疾病，核心方向正确
missing_points: 标准对应应为“慢性疾病”
未体现医学语境下固定说法
